allow: Bash(python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py "barbershop grooming men elegant masculine premium professional" --design-system -p "The Shave Barbershop")

Bash(gemini --yolo "/generate 'professional dark barbershop interior, moody cinematic lighting, vintage leather chair, classic barber station with mirrors, warm amber tones, no text, editorial photography' --aspect=16:9")
Bash(grep -rEi --include="*.tsx" -n "Follow us|Premium catering|Business Location|unforgettable events|Hours$|Events Catered|Years Experience|Client Satisfaction|Step " src/components)
Bash(python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py "SaaS startup landing page premium animations" --design-system -p "Klyro")
